scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web,print -c blue,green,yellow "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:web" "npm run dev:print-bridge"
scripts.dev:desktop: concurrently -n api,web,print,desktop -c blue,green,yellow,cyan "npm run dev:api" "cross-env NIHA_SKIP_BROWSER_OPEN=1 npm run dev:web" "npm run dev:print-bridge" "npm run dev --workspace @niha/desktop"
scripts.dev:desktop:cloud: concurrently -n web,print,desktop -c green,yellow,cyan "cross-env VITE_API_URL=https://niha-jxjq.onrender.com/api npm run dev:web" "npm run dev:print-bridge" "npm run dev --workspace @niha/desktop"
scripts.pack:desktop: npm run build:desktop && node scripts/prepare-desktop-pack.mjs && npm run pack --workspace @niha/desktop
scripts.pack:desktop:dir: npm run build:desktop && node scripts/prepare-desktop-pack.mjs && npm run pack:dir --workspace @niha/desktop
scripts.db:cloud:push: npm run setup:supabase-db && cd apps/api && npx prisma db push
